description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem loads. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, rarray = aloadreal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem loads to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the bus and/or load quantities desired. NOTE: In the description below, the “net” values is the load value minus any in- service distributed generation on that load feeder. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only in-service loads at in-service buses (type code < 4).
for all loads at in-service buses (type code < 4).
for only in-service loads, including those at type 4 buses.

string.description: Actual in-service constant MVA load, in MVA.
Nominal in-service constant MVA load at 1.0 pu voltage, in MVA.
Actual in-service constant current load, in MVA.
Nominal in-service constant current load at 1.0 pu voltage, in MVA.
Actual total in-service constant admittance load, in MVA.
Nominal total in-service constant admittance load at 1.0 pu voltage, in MVA.
Actual in-service load, in MVA.
Nominal in-service load at 1.0 pu voltage, in MVA.
Nominal negative sequence total load at 1.0 pu voltage, in MVA.
Nominal zero sequence total load at 1.0 pu voltage, in MVA.
Actual in-service constant MVA load (units determined by power output options).
Nominal in-service constant MVA load at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output options).
Actual in-service constant current load (units determined by power output options).
Nominal in-service constant current load at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output options).
Actual total in-service constant admittance load (units determined by power output options).
Nominal total in-service constant admittance load at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output options).
Actual in-service load (units determined by power output options).
Nominal in-service load at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output options).
Nominal negative sequence total load at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output options).
Nominal zero sequence total load at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
Sequence data not in case (when STRING = ‘YNEG’, ‘O_YNEG’, ‘YZERO’ or ‘O_YZERO’).
